description: Live validation of the market-as-maker ZK-batched flow: place private orders -> submit_batch verifies the batch-netting proof on-chain -> pool moves the market's public LMSR odds and pays the net cost via authorize_as_current_contract (cross-contract auth), trustlessly.

flow.auth: pool paid the market inside apply_batch via authorize_as_current_contract (validated on real network, no mock)

note: Batch amounts here are raw (net LMSR cost ~0). A visible demo uses fixed-point share amounts. Unaudited research prototype, testnet only.
